title: poa annua var. maroccana
intro: Poa annua var. maroccana, also known as annual bluegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa annua var. maroccana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems.
